completed_tasks.title: Fix naming-convention violations in workflow package
completed_tasks.description: Resolve ~680 @typescript-eslint/naming-convention violations in packages/workflow. Focus on property names that should follow camelCase, constants that should be UPPER_CASE, and other naming standards. This includes error code constants and object property names.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/naming-convention warnings resolved in workflow package
No new naming convention violations introduced

completed_tasks.title: Fix TypeScript Safety Violations in Workflow Package
completed_tasks.description: PARENT TASK: Resolve ~1,203 TypeScript safety violations in packages/workflow. This large task has been decomposed into focused subtasks for each violation type to enable parallel development and better progress tracking.
success_criteria: All @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-* errors resolved in workflow package
Workflow package ESLint passes without safety warnings

completed_tasks.title: Fix TypeScript compilation errors in workflow package
completed_tasks.description: Fix build-blocking TypeScript compilation errors in workflow package caused by naming-convention fixes. Errors include: missing property references (pairedItemNoConnection_CODE_NODE -> pairedItemNoConnectionCodeNode), wrong property access ($GET_PAIRED_ITEM -> $getPairedItem), and duplicate function implementations in workflow.ts. These must be resolved to restore build functionality.

completed_tasks.title: Fix no-explicit-any violations in workflow package
completed_tasks.description: Resolve ~44 @typescript-eslint/no-explicit-any violations in packages/workflow. Replace explicit any types with proper TypeScript types and interfaces to improve type safety.
success_criteria: Proper type definitions added for previously any-typed variables
Generic types used where appropriate instead of any
No new explicit any violations introduced

completed_tasks.title: Fix no-unsafe-assignment violations in workflow package
completed_tasks.description: Resolve ~30 @typescript-eslint/no-unsafe-assignment violations in packages/workflow. Add proper type checking and type guards to prevent unsafe assignments from any/unknown types.
success_criteria: Proper type checking added before assignments from any/unknown
No new unsafe assignment violations introduced

linterReminder.taskTitle: Fix no-unsafe-assignment violations in workflow package
